evals.prompt: I need SSL audit for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-analysis skill for this certificate analysis request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects certificate-analysis for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_analyze_security.
Keeps the response focused on performing SSL/TLS security analysis on a domain, checking certificate security scoring (0-100), auditing TLS configuration, or identifying certificate vulnerabilities.

evals.prompt: Give me a security score and findings summary for the certificate on example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-analysis skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects certificate-analysis instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
